member.name: T:ShopApp.BindingUtilObject
member.summary: Clase base que implementa INotifyPropertyChanged para ser usada como base de ViewModels o modelos enlazables.

member.name: T:ShopApp.Converters.PrecioParaColorConverter
member.summary: Convierte un precio decimal a un color: - Precio ≤ 100 → LimeGreen - Precio > 100 → DarkViolet

member.name: T:ShopApp.Resource
member.summary: Android Resource Designer class. Exposes the Android Resource designer assembly into the project Namespace.
